text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Never has Silence Suzuka appeared more relaxed
than on the day of the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I encourage her to enjoy the race to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking my words to heart, she readies herself for
the race.
